name: Essential Facial
description: A foundational facial that cleanses, tones, and nourishes the skin — perfect for maintaining a healthy, radiant complexion.
description_es: Facial base que limpia, tonifica y nutre la piel para mantener un cutis sano y luminoso.

name: Plasma Acne Facial
description: Advanced plasma technology targets acne-causing bacteria, reduces inflammation, and promotes clearer, calmer skin.
description_es: Tecnología de plasma que elimina bacterias causantes del acné, reduce la inflamación y mejora la apariencia de la piel.

name: HydraFacial
description: A multi-step treatment that deeply cleanses, exfoliates, extracts, and infuses the skin with hydrating serums for an instant glow.
description_es: Tratamiento multietapa que limpia, exfolia, extrae e infunde sueros hidratantes para un brillo inmediato.

name: Lift + Facial
description: A lifting and firming facial that combines toning techniques and actives to redefine the facial contour and restore a youthful appearance.
description_es: Facial reafirmante que combina técnicas de lifting y activos para redefinir el contorno facial y rejuvenecer la apariencia.

name: Brightening Facial
description: Targets dullness and uneven skin tone with brightening actives that reveal a more luminous, even complexion.
description_es: Combate la opacidad y el tono irregular con activos iluminadores que revelan una piel más brillante y uniforme.

name: Sensitive Skin Facial
description: A gentle, calming treatment formulated for reactive and sensitive skin — soothes redness and restores the skin's natural balance.
description_es: Tratamiento suave y calmante para pieles reactivas y sensibles. Alivia el enrojecimiento y restaura el equilibrio natural.

name: Microdermabrasion
description: A non-invasive exfoliation treatment that buffs away dead skin cells, smooths texture, and stimulates cell renewal for fresher skin.
description_es: Tratamiento de exfoliación no invasivo que elimina células muertas, suaviza la textura y estimula la renovación celular.

name: Microdermabrasion + Facial
description: The power of microdermabrasion combined with a customized facial for deeper exfoliation and enhanced skin nourishment.
description_es: La potencia de la microdermoabrasión combinada con un facial personalizado para mayor exfoliación y nutrición profunda.

name: Chemical Peel Facial (Superficial)
description: A controlled superficial peel that refines skin texture, fades dark spots, and promotes a brighter, more even complexion.
description_es: Peeling superficial controlado que refina la textura, difumina manchas y promueve un cutis más brillante y uniforme.

name: Luxury Spa Facial
description: An indulgent, full-sensory facial experience with premium products, massage techniques, and deep nourishment for total skin rejuvenation.
description_es: Una experiencia facial de lujo con productos premium, técnicas de masaje y nutrición profunda para una rejuvenación total.

name: Lash Lift
description: A semi-permanent treatment that lifts and curls your natural lashes from the root, giving your eyes a wide-open, defined look.
description_es: Tratamiento semipermanente que eleva y riza las pestañas naturales desde la raíz para una mirada más abierta y definida.

name: Brow Lamination
description: A brow styling treatment that sets hairs in a uniform, full shape — achieving that fluffy, groomed look that lasts weeks.
description_es: Tratamiento de estilizado de cejas que fija los pelos en una forma uniforme y abundante con un resultado duradero.

name: Tint Lash and Brow
description: A professional tinting service for lashes and brows that adds depth and definition without the daily need for makeup.
description_es: Tinte profesional para pestañas y cejas que añade profundidad y definición sin necesidad de maquillaje diario.

name: Waxing
description: Smooth, precise hair removal using professional wax — leaving skin clean and hair-free for weeks. Price per zone.
description_es: Depilación suave y precisa con cera profesional. Piel limpia y libre de vello por semanas. Precio por zona.

name: Body Scrubs
description: A full-body exfoliation treatment that sloughs away dead skin cells, leaving the skin soft, smooth, and deeply refreshed.
description_es: Tratamiento de exfoliación corporal que elimina células muertas y deja la piel suave, lisa y profundamente renovada.

name: Back Facial
description: A thorough cleansing and treatment protocol designed specifically for the back — targeting congestion, breakouts, and uneven texture.
description_es: Protocolo de limpieza profunda y tratamiento específico para la espalda. Combate la congestión, el acné y la textura irregular.

name: Dermaplaning
description: A gentle exfoliation technique using a sterile blade to remove dead skin cells and peach fuzz, revealing smoother, brighter skin instantly.
description_es: Técnica de exfoliación con bisturí estéril que elimina células muertas y vello fino para una piel más lisa y luminosa al instante.
